allow: PowerShell($key = 'ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAICVomEoJPh7YPfmhR99bsId3LmhH1yh8BpJPMlRKouS3 guoyuting@stu.xmu.edu.cn'; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard]::SetText\($key\); Write-Host "Copied clean key to clipboard")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $knownHosts = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh\\known_hosts"; Write-Host "=== Current known_hosts ==="; if \(Test-Path $knownHosts\) { Get-Content $knownHosts } else { Write-Host "\(file does not exist\)" })
